Title: Cuboid Pattern
Description: Defines a cuboid region relative to the Pattern’s origin. The region is anchored by Min and Max inclusive points. This is similar to the shape of a creative Selection Tool. The SubPattern is tested against every position inside the cuboid. The Cuboid Pattern validates only if all the inner positions are validated by the SubPattern.

Outputs.Label: Max
Outputs.Description: Inclusive maximum point of the cuboid relative to the Pattern’s origin.

Outputs.Label: Min
Outputs.Description: Inclusive minimum point of the cuboid relative to the Pattern’s origin.

Outputs.Label: SubPattern
Outputs.Description: The Cuboid uses this Pattern to validate the positions inside itself.
